meta.title: Portrait Values Questionnaire (PVQ-40)
meta.subtitle: Map your motivational value priorities.
meta.description: A 40-item portrait-based values assessment. By default, scores are centered using MRAT.
meta.disclaimer: This assessment supports self-reflection and does not provide a clinical diagnosis.

consent.title: Consent and Disclaimer
consent.body: I understand this is a self-reflection tool, not a clinical test, and I consent to store results locally on this device.

interpretation.low: Lower relative importance in your current responses.
interpretation.medium: Moderate relative importance in your current responses.
interpretation.high: Higher relative importance in your current responses.

items.pvq40_001: Thinking up new ideas and being creative is important to this person.
items.pvq40_002: This person likes to make their own decisions and choose their own path.
items.pvq40_003: It is important to this person to be independent in daily life.
items.pvq40_004: This person values freedom to think and act in original ways.
items.pvq40_005: This person seeks excitement and new experiences.
items.pvq40_006: Variety and challenge are important to this person.
items.pvq40_007: This person likes surprises and a life full of change.
items.pvq40_008: Taking risks for adventure appeals to this person.
items.pvq40_009: Enjoying life and having fun are important to this person.
items.pvq40_010: This person likes to treat themselves and enjoy pleasures.
items.pvq40_011: This person values comfort and sensual enjoyment.
items.pvq40_012: Doing things that feel good right now matters to this person.
items.pvq40_013: Being very successful matters to this person.
items.pvq40_014: This person wants others to recognize their accomplishments.
items.pvq40_015: Showing personal competence is important to this person.
items.pvq40_016: This person strives to meet high standards and perform well.
items.pvq40_017: Having influence over people is important to this person.
items.pvq40_018: This person wants to be in charge and direct others.
items.pvq40_019: Social status and prestige matter to this person.
items.pvq40_020: Controlling resources and decisions is important to this person.
items.pvq40_021: Safety and stability are very important to this person.
items.pvq40_022: This person avoids anything that could threaten order.
items.pvq40_023: Living in secure surroundings matters to this person.
items.pvq40_024: This person wants society to be stable and predictable.
items.pvq40_025: It is important to this person to obey rules.
items.pvq40_026: This person avoids upsetting or inconveniencing others.
items.pvq40_027: Being polite and self-controlled matters to this person.
items.pvq40_028: This person follows social expectations even when no one watches.
items.pvq40_029: Respecting traditions is important to this person.
items.pvq40_030: This person tries to follow customs passed down by family or community.
items.pvq40_031: Religious or spiritual traditions matter to this person.
items.pvq40_032: This person values humility and accepting one’s place in life.
items.pvq40_033: Helping people close to them is very important to this person.
items.pvq40_034: This person wants to be loyal to friends and family.
items.pvq40_035: This person tries to be responsible and dependable for loved ones.
items.pvq40_036: Caring for the well-being of close others matters to this person.
items.pvq40_037: This person cares about equality and justice for all people.
items.pvq40_038: Protecting nature and the environment is important to this person.
items.pvq40_039: This person tries to understand people who are different.
items.pvq40_040: Promoting peace and tolerance matters deeply to this person.
